title: He Raised $26M Betting on Probabilities, Not Guesses | Koah Labs, Nic Baird
summary: Nic Baird, founder of Koah Labs, argues that ad monetization is the superior model for AI tools over subscriptions, and identifies human trust as the primary bottleneck for AI agent adoption rather than technical limitations. He describes his decision-making approach based on probability and expected value, learned from competitive sailing.
